title: French presidential frontrunner Jordan Bardella vows to win 2027 polls and shift course in the EU
content: Jordan Bardella, leader of France's far-right National Rally, said he would like to "put the Commission and the EU back at the service of the nations and no longer the other way around".

title: Jordan Bardella meets Karol Nawrocki in Warsaw

title: EU Commission to develop diversification instrument, von der Leyen says
